task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N070 state-transition-mapping artifact. The ground truth is at: 状态流转表.csv (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured
